scenes.description: Performance of the new song 'SNAKE EYES' with backup dancers.
MC section: Discussing the new song and introducing birthday merchandise.

ready the screaming.

ready the screaming.

watch me ripping it all.

watch me ripping it all.

just waiting and see.

just waiting and see.

subtitles.original: We hit that high, Snake Eyes.

subtitles.english: Let the beat drop! Go!

subtitles.original: We go hard! Go! Go! Go!
subtitles.english: We go hard! Go! Go! Go!

subtitles.original: We go hard! I want it all.
subtitles.english: We go hard! I want it all.

subtitles.original: 運命の賭けだ (Unmei no kake da) Checkmate.

subtitles.english: Take the crown.

subtitles.original: 그 끝이 달려가 (Geu kkeuti dallyeoga) Rule the game.

subtitles.original: We'll hit that high, Snake Eyes.

subtitles.original: もう躊躇はない (Mou chuucho wa nai) Don't stop.
subtitles.english: No more hesitation, Don't stop.

Don't be afraid of losing,
it's just a new beginning.
subtitles.english:
Don't be afraid of losing,
it's just a new beginning.

subtitles.english: Fly high with pride and leave our fears behind!

subtitles.english: Ha ha ha! It's finally out!

subtitles.english: I hope you all enjoyed my new song, Snake Eyes!

subtitles.english: This has been such a long process...

I can't even talk! I'm exhausted but also,
I'm so happy.
